summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife login page visual refinements. All 16 specified requirements successfully verified including TradeLife wordmark styling, glass panel design, form elements, and interactive functionality.
passed_tests: Login page loads at /login route without errors
TradeLife wordmark displays with Playfair Display serif italic font
Tagline 'Built for trades' visible with decorative lines
Glass sign-in panel renders with proper styling and content
Welcome back heading and command centre subtext display correctly
Email input field with mail icon and correct placeholder
Password input field with lock icon and correct placeholder
Password visibility toggle functionality works perfectly
Email and Password labels visible above inputs
Forgot password link points to /forgot-password
Sign in button with blue gradient styling
OR divider visible between buttons
Continue with Google button with Google icon
Sign up text and link visible, points to /signup
Secure enterprise access footer text displays
Form inputs accept user input correctly
All buttons are clickable and functional
Mobile responsiveness works properly
Background image loads correctly
No console errors detected
